notes: Pooled post hoc analysis of lumateperone phase 3 studies for bipolar II depression. Secondary analysis, not original RCT.

title: Responses to untrained and unexpected balance perturbations following reactive balance training among people with chronic stroke: a feasibility study.
notes: Canadian pilot RCT of reactive balance training post-stroke. Non-pharma, non-MH.

title: An anxiety regulation framework with a positive emotion-guided strategy: Integrating EEG neurofeedback and music intervention.
notes: EEG neurofeedback + music intervention for anxiety regulation. Non-pharma, non-Canadian.

title: Identifying robust predictors of treatment response in trauma-affected refugees: Results from a randomised controlled trial.
notes: RCT of treatment predictors for trauma-affected refugees. Danish study.

title: A Randomized, Controlled Trial of the Novel, Potent Kv7 Channel Opener Azetukalner in Individuals with Major Depressive Disorder and Anhedonia: Neural Response to Reward, Clinical Outcomes, and Safety.
notes: Phase 2 RCT of azetukalner (Kv7 opener) for MDD with anhedonia. US study (Baylor, Mount Sinai). Not Canadian.

title: Depressive symptomatology and their correlates among caregivers of children and adolescents living with HIV in KwaZulu-Natal, South Africa.
notes: Observational study of depressive symptoms in caregivers of children with HIV in South Africa. Observational, non-Canadian.

title: FX ENTRAIN: scientific context, study design, and biomarker driven brain-computer interfaces in neurodevelopmental conditions.
notes: Study design for brain-computer interfaces in Fragile X syndrome. Non-pharma, protocol/design paper.

title: The Brain Health Index: Integrating vulnerability, resilience, and cognitive function into a unified measure of cognitive health and risk of neurodegenerative disease.
notes: Development/evaluation of Brain Health Index for cognitive health. Not an RCT.

title: Efficacy of low-frequency repetitive transcranial magnetic stimulation in the treatment of sleep disorders in the early stage of Parkinson disease: A single-center double-blind controlled study.
notes: RCT of low-frequency rTMS for sleep disorders in Parkinson's. Chinese study, non-pharma.

title: Protocol of a randomized controlled trial of nurse-led de-stressful skill interventions in patients with depression disorder.
notes: Protocol for RCT of nurse-led de-stressful skill interventions for depression. Non-pharma, protocol only, non-Canadian.

title: Transdiagnostic Effects of a Chinese Herbal Formula DEP-2306 on Improving Sleep and Mood in Adults With Depressive Episode With Insufficient Symptoms: A Real-World Study.
notes: Real-world study of Chinese herbal formula DEP-2306 for depressive episode. Chinese, not an RCT.

title: Testing the Clinical Dementia Rating Sum of Boxes as an Outcome for Dementia with Lewy Bodies Clinical Trials.
notes: Testing CDR as outcome measure for DLB clinical trials. Not an interventional RCT.
